vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #623: name and encode Context Rot as a first-class concept in context/context.md with mitigations.

plan.title: feat(context): name and encode Context Rot as a first-class concept with mitigations

narratives.Description: Add a named definition of 'Context Rot' (degradation of decision quality as context length grows; distinct from context loss) to context/context.md, plus four mitigation rules: fresh-context agents for verification; vBRIEF compression checkpoints; bounded sub-tasks; clean-context-as-capability-multiplier framing. Source: Cognition's 'Multi-Agents: What's Actually Working'.

x-migrator.Description: Encode Context Rot in context/context.md (companion to #622 / slizard#124).

references.title: Issue #623: feat(context): name and encode Context Rot as a first-class concept with mitigations
